narrative.description: Resident Evil 4 blends over-the-shoulder action combat with resource-scarce survival horror in a rural European setting.
narrative.core_loop: Explore villages and compounds, manage limited ammo and healing, fight infected enemies, solve locks, and survive set-piece boss encounters.

mechanics.map_notes: In Resident Evil 4, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Resident Evil 4, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Resident Evil 4, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.
mechanics.expression: In Resident Evil 4, a survival mechanic where the player character possesses a finite quantity of health points that decrease when taking damage, with depletion resulting in failure.

mechanics.map_notes: In Resident Evil 4, a combat encounter structure in which an enemy signals an incoming attack through a distinct visual or audio cue before the attack resolves.
mechanics.expression: In Resident Evil 4, a combat encounter structure in which an enemy signals an incoming attack through a distinct visual or audio cue before the attack resolves.

mechanics.map_notes: In Resident Evil 4, zoomed aim mode trades movement speed for accuracy and range.
mechanics.expression: In Resident Evil 4, zoomed aim mode trades movement speed for accuracy and range.

mechanics.map_notes: In Resident Evil 4, designated rest points save progress, restore health or resources, and set respawn locations on death.
mechanics.expression: In Resident Evil 4, designated rest points save progress, restore health or resources, and set respawn locations on death.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Resident Evil 4 through its core horror loop.
